author: Flynn Cruse
name: Skill Forge: Autonomous Experiment System (Local RTX 4070 Validation)
blurb: Non-record submission demonstrating an autonomous ML experimentation system (Skill Forge) built with Claude Code skills. Inspired by Karpathy autoresearch + DeepMind AlphaEvolve. Local validation on RTX 4070 Laptop (8GB VRAM) at reduced model dimensions (7L/512d, seq512). Compute grant pending for 8×H100 competition runs.
notes: Local-only run on RTX 4070 Laptop (8GB VRAM). Model scaled to 7L/512d/seq512 to fit VRAM. Not comparable to competition baseline (9L/512d/seq1024 on H100 = 1.2244 BPB). This submission demonstrates the approach and tooling, not a competitive BPB score. Full competition run planned after compute grant award.
